name: aind
description: AI-Native Dev flow for Azure DevOps + GitHub. Agents for onboarding, intake (readiness scoring), planning (delivers an implementation plan as a GitHub PR), and implementation (builds an approved plan into a GitHub code PR, drives an independent code review to a verdict, then closes out on merge with the terminal status), plus a dreaming phase that synthesises the flow's lessons-learned into proposed .claude config improvements as a human-gated PR — plus the shared, scripted ADO/GitHub mechanics they rely on.
